title: ホープフルSの後に・エデンへの道

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship's results are fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she can keep this up, she'll be ready for the
Classics next year for sure!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! You gotta admit, I was savory enough to
make a smoked ray's fin jealous, eh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: To think, now I've conquered the land and the sea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since the race was only on land, it's hard to
agree...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I guess that means that's it for the Twinkle Series,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now I have nowhere to channel my burning
competitive spirit...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Nothing I can do about it, though. Might as well
get a job putting those fake decorative leaf
thingies in supermarket sushi boxes.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but filling those fish-shaped containers with
soy sauce sounds fun too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The real challenge of the Twinkle Series is in the
Classics that still lie ahead of us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open my mouth to tell her there are still plenty
of intense races left, when...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hm? Hmmm?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaah!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Holy fish and chips! Check this out, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You won't believe it, but a new chapter of the
Book of Secrets just dropped!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Don't you remember? It's the book detailing the
Umamusume utopia, Eden.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Gulp... All right, let's take a look...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"O Umamusume in search of Eden, go, and face
your greatest adversary in the Classics."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: "Only then will your path to Eden be revealed..."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Is that the coolest thing or what?! That is so awesome!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'd totally forgotten about Eden!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So, I just have to beat the big shots in the
Classics, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm about to burst from excitement right
now!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Follow me, Trainer! I gotta start practicing my
Flaming Death Fist ASAP!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reason for her sudden surge in enthusiasm is
beyond me, but I'm just pleased she's so excited
for the Classics.
